title: A Rainy Day
sentences: Today the sky is grey and cloudy.
It started to rain early in the morning.
I put on my coat and my boots.
I take my umbrella before I leave home.
The wind is cold and quite strong.
People walk quickly to stay dry.
The streets are wet and shiny.
I hear the rain on my window.
In the afternoon, the rain stops.
The sun comes out and the sky is blue.
I go outside to enjoy the fresh air.
